name: Credit & Usage Dashboard
description: Real-time credit balance and usage tracking dashboard. Polls backend for credit status, displays 30-day trends with mock data fallback, cost visualization.
run: cd tools/usage-dashboard && npm install && npm run dev

input.name: GATEWAY_URL
input.description: Backend gateway URL for credit API

output.name: credit_status
output.description: Current credit balance and usage data

author: Tiranyx
